facts.statement: The Amazon River (source to sea) is over 5,000 km long
facts.actual: 6,400–6,500 km including its full source system

facts.statement: The Amazon River discharges over 400,000 m³ of water per second at its peak
The Amazon River basin covers 5 million km²
Even at its driest, the Amazon River discharges over 100,000 m³ per second
The Amazon River's main channel (excluding source tributaries) is over 5,000 km long
facts.actual: The direct channel length is approximately 3,750 km
